g.text: Scalability | Linear with CPUs | Degrades with CPUs
Read complexity | Sum N values | Single read

text.tspan: // Read returns array of N values
// Read returns array of N values

div.p: • Write-heavy counters/histograms • High-frequency updates (>10K/sec) • Multiple CPUs hit same keys • Approximate counts acceptable
• Read-heavy, write-rare • Per-entry partitioning (different keys/CPU) • Exact values required • Memory constrained
